title: stelis delicata
intro: Stelis delicata, also known as the orchid Stelis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. The herbal preparations of Stelis delicata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
